## Linked Issue

Required:

- Link exactly one issue in this PR body, for example `Closes #12`
- Claim the issue with `/claim` before opening the PR

## Checklist

- [ ] I commented `/claim` on the linked issue and the issue is assigned to me
- [ ] This PR is scoped to one issue only
- [ ] The PR description explains what changed
- [ ] Focused verification is listed below

## Verification

- [ ] Add commands here
